info.title: Kaizten Task REST API
info.description:
REST API used to define, store, access, and execute algorithms. The algorithms are entities that receive a set of input parameter values and return a set of output parameter values. These algorithms can be machine learning methods, optimization techniques, or simulation models, among others.
The API supports Cross Origin Resource Sharing (CORS) for AJAX requests from any origin. The following header is included in the corresponding responses: Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *. You can read the CORS W3C Recommendation to learn more about CORS.
In the remainder of this documentation, it is assumed that the REST API is deployed in an IP and port denoted as IP and PORT, respectively.

tags.name: DataHander
tags.description: Data API for datasets and folders

get.description: Fetches a workflow using its unique identifier (UUID). Requires authentication.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Unique UUID of the workflow to be retrieved.

401.description: Unauthorized. Missing or invalid authentication token.

403.description: Forbidden. User does not have the required role.

put.description: Updates a workflow identified by its UUID with new name, scenario, nodes, environment variables, or enabled state.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: UUID of the workflow to update.

requestBody.description: JSON structure representing the updated workflow data, including name, scenario, nodes, and environment variables.

400.description: Invalid workflow ID or request body.

401.description: Unauthorized. The request lacks valid authentication credentials.

403.description: Forbidden. User does not have the required role.

delete.description: Deletes a workflow from the system using its UUID. Requires authentication.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: UUID of the workflow to delete.

401.description: Unauthorized. Missing or invalid authentication token.

403.description: Forbidden. User does not have the required role.

401.description: Unauthorized

401.description: Unauthorized

403.description: Forbidden

404.description: Scheduled execution or operation not found

401.description: Unauthorized

403.description: Forbidden

options.summary: Options for a specific scheduled execution

get.description: It provides a specific operation by indicating its identifier. The operation is provided in the response.

401.description: Unauthorized. Missing or invalid authentication token.

put.description: It updates an operation by specifying the fields to be modified.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Identifier of the operation to be updated.

200.description: The request modifications are successfully updated.

401.description: Unauthorized. Missing or invalid authentication token.

404.description: The operation with the given identifier is not found.

403.description: Forbidden. User does not have the required role.

delete.description: It deletes an existing operation by specifying its identifier. The deleted operation is provided in the response.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Identifier of the operation to be deleted.

401.description: Unauthorized. Missing or invalid authentication token.

404.description: The operation with the given identifier is not found.

200.description: The operation has been deleted successfully.

403.description: Forbidden. User does not have the required role.

options.description: Returns allowed HTTP methods for the /v1/workflows/{id} endpoint. Typically used for CORS preflight requests.

401.description: Unauthorized. Missing or invalid authentication token.

403.description: Forbidden. User does not have the required role.

get.summary: It obtains a dataset by its ID
get.description: Retrieves a dataset identified by its UUID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: UUID of the dataset to retrieve.

404.description: The specified dataset does not exist.

400.description: The dataset ID is not valid.

200.description: The dataset has been successfully retrieved.

401.description: Client tries to access the dataset, but the request lacks valid authentication credentials.

put.summary: It updates a dataset in a folder
put.description: Updates non-versioning fields (name, labels, description, change metadata) of a dataset. Does not create a new version.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Id of the dataset to update

200.description: The dataset has been successfully updated.

401.description: Client tries to update the dataset, but the request lacks valid authentication credentials.

400.description: The request for updating the dataset is not valid.

delete.summary: It deletes a specific dataset in a given folder
delete.description: Deletes a dataset from a specified folder.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the dataset to delete

404.description: The specified folder or dataset does not exist.

409.description: There is a server-side issue preventing the deletion of the dataset.

400.description: The dataset ID is not valid.

200.description: The dataset has been successfully deleted from the folder.

401.description: It indicates that the request lacks valid authentication credentials or the user lacks necessary permissions.

get.description: Returns the list of all workflows stored in the system. Requires authentication.

401.description: Unauthorized. Missing or invalid authentication token.

204.description: No workflows available in the system.

403.description: Forbidden. User does not have the required role.

post.description: Creates a workflow with the provided name, scenario, nodes, and environment variables.

requestBody.description: JSON structure representing the workflow to create. It must include workflow name, scenario, nodes, and environment variables.

401.description: Unauthorized. Missing or invalid authentication token.

403.description: Forbidden. User does not have the required role.

post.description: Imports an existing workflow from an external representation (for example, a file previously exported).

requestBody.description: JSON structure representing the workflow to import. Must include the workflow ID, name, scenario, nodes, and environment variables.

401.description: Unauthorized. Missing or invalid authentication token.

403.description: Forbidden. User does not have the required role.

post.description: Triggers the execution of a workflow identified by its UUID. The workflow will run asynchronously and return a task reference.

parameters.name: responseUrl
parameters.description: Webhook callback URL where task status will be sent

parameters.name: workFlowName
parameters.description: Name of the workflow to execute.

401.description: Unauthorized. Missing or invalid authentication token.

400.description: Invalid workflow ID or request body.

post.description: Creates and submits a new task cloned from an existing one, optionally overriding parameters, environment variables, and input data.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Identifier of the task to re-run.

202.description: Re-run task accepted and submitted for execution.

401.description: Unauthorized. Missing or invalid authentication token.

400.description: Task is currently running or an override key is invalid.

200.description: Re-run task accepted and submitted for execution.

404.description: Task or its associated operation not found.

403.description: Forbidden. User does not have the required role.

403.description: Forbidden

post.description: Enables a scheduled execution

401.description: Unauthorized

403.description: Forbidden

401.description: Unauthorized

403.description: Forbidden

get.description: It provides all the operations registered. The returned operations will be paginated to 20 items by default. Further pages can be requested by means of the page query paramenter. It can also set a custom page size up to 100 with the size parameter. It can also provides a list of operations which fit the specified filters.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Size of the page to be returned. Default value: 20.

401.description: Unauthorized. Missing or invalid authentication token.

200.description: The request has succeeded and the operations are included in the body of the response.

post.description: It creates a new operation by specifying at least the required fields. The created operation is provided in the response.

401.description: Unauthorized. Missing or invalid authentication token.

200.description: The request has been fulfilled and has resulted in one operation being created. The new operation is included in the body of the response.

403.description: Forbidden. User does not have the required role.

options.description: Returns allowed HTTP methods for the /v1/workflows endpoint. Typically used for CORS preflight requests.

401.description: Unauthorized. Missing or invalid authentication token.

403.description: Forbidden. User does not have the required role.

post.description: It executes a specific operation by indicating its name. The operation can receive parameter values in the body of the request in the following formats:

parameters.name: operationName
parameters.description: Name of the operation to execute.

401.description: Unauthorized. Missing or invalid authentication token.

400.description: If there is something wrong in the input parameters, it will be returned a BAD_REQUEST status with detailes about the errors.

404.description: The operation with the given name is not found.

200.description: The request has succeeded and the execution of the operation is queued. The information about the task created is provided in the response.

post.summary: Create a new file in local storage
post.description: It creates a new file by specifying its content. A summary of the file submitted is provided in the response.

401.description: Unauthorized. Missing or invalid authentication token.

201.description: The request has been fulfilled and has resulted in a file being created. A summary of the submission of the new file is included in the body of the response.

401.description: Unauthorized

post.summary: Creates a new version of a dataset
post.description: Creates a new version within the same lineage as the referenced dataset. Requires at least a changePayload or a new file.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the dataset to create a new version from

parameters.name: folderName
parameters.description: Name of the folder for file upload (required if file is provided).

request.description: JSON metadata for the new version (name, labels, description, changeType, changePayload).

file.description: Optional new file for the new version.

401.description: Client tries to create the version, but the request lacks valid authentication credentials.

400.description: Neither changePayload nor file was provided.

get.description: It provides the set of folders registered.

200.description: The request has succeeded and the folders are provided.

401.description: Client tries to access the folders, but the request lacks valid authentication credentials.

post.description: It creates a new folder. The information about the created folder is provided in the response.

201.description: The request has been fulfilled and has given rise to a new folder. The information about the created folder is provided.

400.description: Request for creating the folder is not valid.

401.description: Client tries to create the folder, but the request lacks valid authentication credentials.

post.summary: It creates a new object in a folder
post.description: It creates a new object in an existing folder. A summary of the file submitted is provided in the response.

parameters.name: folderName
parameters.description: Name of the target folder where the dataset will be stored.

request.description: JSON metadata of the dataset to create (name, labels, description, linkage).

file.description: Optional file to upload as the dataset content.

401.description: Client tries to create the object, but the request lacks valid authentication credentials.

400.description: The request for creating the dataset is not valid.

201.description: The request has been fulfilled and has resulted in a file being created. A summary of the submission of the new file is included in the body of the response.

post.description: Generates a PDF report containing system information about operations, tasks, and workflows.

get.description: It provides all the tasks of the user if there is no filters specified, otherwise will be returned only those which fit the filters. The returned tasks will be paginated to 25 items by default. Further pages can be requested by means of the page query paramenter. It can also set a custom page size up to 100 with the size parameter.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Size of the page to be returned. Default value: 20.

401.description: Unauthorized. Missing or invalid authentication token.

200.description: The request has succeeded and the tasks are included in the body of the response.

403.description: Forbidden. User does not have the required role.

get.description: Retrieves the complete list of datasets registered in the system.

get.summary: It obtains dataset content from a folder
get.description: Provides the raw content of a dataset located in a given folder.

401.description: Client tries to access the dataset content, but the request lacks valid authentication credentials.

404.description: The specified dataset does not exist.

get.description: Retrieves datasets with optional filtering and pagination support.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Query to filter datasets by name

401.description: Client tries to access the datasets, but the request lacks valid authentication credentials.

400.description: The pagination parameters are not valid.

200.description: The datasets have been successfully retrieved.

get.summary: It obtains datasets of a specific folder
get.description: Retrieves all datasets belonging to the specified folder with pagination support.

401.description: Client tries to access the datasets, but the request lacks valid authentication credentials.

200.description: The datasets have been successfully retrieved.

400.description: The folder name or pagination parameters are not valid.

404.description: The specified folder does not exist.

get.summary: Get all versions of a dataset lineage
get.description: Returns all dataset versions sharing the same linkage, ordered by version ascending.

parameters.name: linkage
parameters.description: Linkage UUID identifying the dataset lineage

401.description: Client tries to access the dataset versions, but the request lacks valid authentication credentials.

get.description: It provides the information of a given folder.

200.description: The request has succeeded and the folder is provided.

400.description: Name of the requested folder is not valid.

401.description: Client tries to access the folder, but the request lacks valid authentication credentials.

404.description: The specified folder does not exist.

delete.description: It deletes a given folder. The information about the deleted folder is provided in the response.

parameters.name: folderName
parameters.description: Name of the folder to delete

400.description: Name of the folder to delete is not valid.

200.description: The folder has been successfully deleted.

401.description: Client tries to delete the folder, but the request lacks valid authentication credentials.

409.description: There is a server-side issue preventing the deletion of the folder.

get.summary: Compare file similarity within a bucket
get.description: Compares a file with all other files in the bucket and returns similarity scores using the specified algorithms.

parameters.name: folderName
parameters.description: Name of the folder containing the files to compare.

parameters.name: fileName
parameters.description: Name of the file to use as the reference for comparison.

parameters.name: similarityTypes
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of similarity algorithms to use (HASH, JACCARD, CHUNK_OVERLAP). Defaults to all algorithms if not provided.

400.description: Invalid bucket name, file name or similarity type.

get.description: Generates a PDF report containing detailed information about all system operations. The report includes comprehensive details for each operation.

401.description: Unauthorized. Missing or invalid authentication token.

403.description: Forbidden. User does not have the required role.

parameters.name: fileName
parameters.description: Name of the backup file to delete

DatasetPutRequestBody.description: Request body containing the fields to update.

TaskRerunPostRequestBody.description: Request body with overrides for parameters, environment variables, and inputs.

ComputationalExperimentPostRequestBody.description: Experiment data - datasetUris can be in formats: '/folder-name/dataset-name', 'minio://folder-name/dataset-name', or 'folder-name/dataset-name'

ComputationalExperimentExecutePostReques.description: Run details for the experiment execution

FolderPostRequestBody.description: Request body containing the name of the folder to create.
